text: Create a civil litigation strategy memo for this dispute. Cover factual strengths and weaknesses, legal issues, jurisdiction and forum considerations, procedural risks, limitation/deadline concerns, evidence gaps, probable defenses, interim relief options, settlement posture, expected timeline, cost pressure points, and the most efficient path to resolution.
snippet: Create a civil litigation strategy memo for this dispute. Cover factual strengths and weaknesses, legal issues, jurisdiction and forum considerations, procedural risks, limitation/deadline concerns, evidence
